languages.text:
Shields allow the wielder to block attacks.
The first attack wih a shield in a turn costs -1 AP.

traits.locale_text:
Shields allow the wielder to block attacks.

languages.text:
Shields allow the wielder to {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g} attacks.
The first use of a shield attack in a {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} costs −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} less.
languages.original_text:
Щиты позволяют персонажу блокировать атаки.
Первое использование {g|f:1c5f4edca9f64fe0911bc946e0b4ea4a}Удара щитом{/g} за ход не требует затрат ОД.
